title: Runestones
description: Adds 5 unique Runestones that can be socketed into weapons.
body:
This mod adds five unique Runestones that can be socketed into weapons. Swords and axes can hold one Runestone, while maces can hold up to five. Each Runestone is unique—only one of each type can exist in the world at a time.

## Obtaining Runestones

To see the craftings use the Roughly Enough Items (REI) Mod.

## Runestone Effects

When a Runestone is socketed into a weapon, it grants the following effect:

- Luck: Grants Hero of the Village for 10 minutes.

- Dash: Right-click with the weapon to "yeet" yourself in the direction you're facing.

- Heart: Permanently adds 10 extra hearts (health points) to your maximum health.

- Strength: Applies Strength III while the weapon is held.

- Sky: Negates all fall damage while the weapon is held.

## Socketing and Removing Runestones

Socket: Hold the weapon in your main hand and the Runestone in your offhand, then sneak + right-click.

Remove: Hold the weapon in your main hand and nothing in your offhand, then sneak + right-click.

Runestones are stored in the weapon’s data and can be swapped or removed at any time.

Enjoy experimenting with these powerful, one-of-a-kind artifacts—just be careful not to lose them!
